title: Executive Order 7402—Modification of Executive Order No. 6910 of November 26, 1934, as Amended, Withdrawing Public Lands in Certain States

flags.justification: A narrow, technical modification enabling the Secretary of the Interior to withdraw specific tracts for reclamation purposes under an existing statute.
A clear, specific modification with no ambiguity about responsibility.
Single purpose: enabling a specific land withdrawal for reclamation.
A land-status action creating no compliance regime.
No compliance regime exists for an incentive structure to attach to.

This modifies an underlying 'temporary' withdrawal order (EO 6910) with no defined end-date, consistent with the permanence gap already identified in similar land-withdrawal orders in this corpus (EO 7329, EO 8344).
No existing oversight mechanism is removed.
No compliance regime is created by this order.
An extremely narrow, technical, routine application of an established land-management mechanism.
No second agency or mandate is implicated.
No coverage population or exemption structure is created.

notes: Validation batch (negative). Structural weight: 1/12 = 8.3%. First negative-class EO coded, drawn from the pre-registered negative sample (N=149, seed 20260703).
